TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Zimbabwa, title = Zimbabwa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zimbabwa} }

S.FORM: Zimbabwa hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 390,757 sq km (maki' tay 61ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 386,847 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,910 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 14,546,961. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga42.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 39.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 18%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Harare. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Robert Mugabe, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1987 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Zimbabwa hya' ga cyux maki' tay 20 00 S, 30 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 390,757 sq km (maki' tay 61ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 386,847 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 3,910 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 14,546,961. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga42.50% , lhlahuy hya' ga 39.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 18%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Harare. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Robert Mugabe, aring ryax 22 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 1987 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: zimő≤aő≤wa ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a ńßarare. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj s~…ēpajat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a roő≤ert mu…£aő≤e, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
